# `into semver-range` for [conversions](/commands/categories/conversions.md)

<div class='command-title'>Convert a string to a semver range.</div>

## Signature

```> into semver-range {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input        | output       |
| ------------ | ------------ |
| string       | semver-range |
| semver-range | semver-range |
## Examples

Convert a string to a semver range
```nu
> '>=1.0.0' | into semver-range

```

Convert a complex range
```nu
> '^1.2.3' | into semver-range

```
